# Scenario: inspect-retry-lineage-tty
# Invocation: `/inspect retry` on session ses_01HXYZABCDEF01 turn 5.
# Phase 4 rule: lineage UI reads TurnTransition[] (Phase 2 Workstream 3), NOT attempt-array traversal.
# Transition reason codes come from Phase 2:
#   next_turn | user_retry | host_retry | recovery_required | approval_denied_retry | protocol_mismatch_recovery
# Vertical chain format from Phase 4 Workstream section "Retry Lineage Uses Transition Records".
#
# This scenario: turn 5 failed twice, succeeded on attempt 3.
#   attempt 1 -> host_retry (tests failed)
#   attempt 2 -> approval_denied_retry (rule tightened)
#   attempt 3 -> succeeded (terminal)

\e[36m\e[1mInspect\e[0m  \e[2msession ses_01HXYZ…F01 / turn 5\e[0m  summary  provenance  review  artifacts  approvals  \e[1m[retry]\e[0m  logs

\e[1mTurn 5 lineage\e[0m  chainId=chain_01HXYZCHAIN5  depth=3

  \e[1mattempt_01HXYZT5A1\e[0m  standard  \e[31mfailed (exit 1)\e[0m
     │  transition: \e[33mhost_retry\e[0m   chainId=chain_01HXYZCHAIN5  depth=1
     │  reason: "tests failed; retrying with verbose output"
     │  transitionId: tr_01HXYZT5TR1  at 2026-05-01T12:21:04Z
     ▼
  \e[1mattempt_01HXYZT5A2\e[0m  standard  \e[31mblocked (exit 2)\e[0m
     │  transition: \e[33mapproval_denied_retry\e[0m   chainId=chain_01HXYZCHAIN5  depth=2
     │  reason: "network(api.github.com) denied; retrying without net fetch"
     │  transitionId: tr_01HXYZT5TR2  at 2026-05-01T12:21:33Z
     ▼
  \e[1mattempt_01HXYZT5A3\e[0m  standard  \e[32msucceeded (exit 0)\e[0m
     (terminal — reviewed outcome: accepted)

\e[1mSummary\e[0m
  attempts:     3
  transitions:  2
  initiator:    host (2 of 2)
  final:        succeeded
  total time:   118s

\e[33m[q]uit  [p]rovenance attempt-3  [l]ogs attempt-3\e[0m
